- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Execution Guidelines
- Track progress through this checklist.
- Mark each step complete and add a summary.
- Use '.' as the working directory unless user specifies otherwise.
- Only install extensions specified by project setup info.
- Avoid generating media unless requested.
- Use placeholders for assets and note to replace.
- Task is complete when project is scaffolded, compiled, README.md and copilot-instructions.md exist, and user has launch instructions.
